name: Fargo Reported Tournament
description: $35 entry, green fee included. $5 of entry goes to snap challenge pot (over $500) ? 4 random players selected each week with full field. Handicap race. Double elimination. Fargo reported. No Fargo no problem ? they will get it started for you. Sign in 4PM, starts 5PM. Walk-ins welcome. Contact: Johnny Nuggz, Jessica Soto, or Adrian Cantu to register. Organized by Stick Talk. Located at 13420 S Cicero Ave, Crestwood IL.

phone_number: $15 entry. 7 foot tables. 570 Fargo & Under. Race to 2/1. Break & run pot at 11:30. Sign up 8PM, start 8:30PM. Every Saturday. Located at 9112 Camp Bowie, Fort Worth TX 76116.

name: Open 9-Ball Tournament
phone_number: $25 entry includes $5 admin fee. Open 9 ball. A side 5/3 worst race, B side 4/3 worst race. 1 game spot per 50 Fargo points. Optional $10 side pot. Sign ups 2PM, start 3PM. Organized by Rack It and Stack It.

name: Modified Masters 3 vs 3 Pool Tournament
description: $150 entry + $12 green fee + $8 admin fee. Player auction at 10:30AM. 32 team max. Double elimination. Mixed format: winners side race to 9 (8 games 8-ball + 9 games 9-ball), losers side race to 7 (6 games 8-ball + 7 games 9-ball). Lag winner chooses break/order and format/matchups. 8-Ball rules: MO8 rules. 9-Ball rules: standard. Max handicap of 18, only 1 MO8 skill level 7 or 8 per roster. Coaching: one coach per rack per player. Sign up 10AM, player auction 10:30AM. Located at 7045 US-61, Barnhart MO 63012.
$5 entry, no green fee (pay as you go). Bar matches 100% up to $100. BCA rules, call pocket ball-in-hand. Sign up with Ryan Gill. Every Tuesday. Located at 17730 Ambaum Blvd S, Burien WA 98148.

name: 1000 & Under Scotch Doubles Tournament
description: $70 entry includes greens. $100 added at half field (16), $250 added with full field (32). Calcutta at 11AM. Race to 4/4. 1000 & under combined Fargo cap. Must have 75+ games in FargoRate system to participate. Fargo locked at signup ? if you exceed cap by 15+ points on day of tourney you cannot participate. Doors open 10AM. Saturday April 4th 2026. Text 920-539-6750 or Facebook message Charlie's page to sign up. FB comments not a guarantee of signup. Located at 1348 Wisconsin Ave, N Fond du Lac WI 54937.

name: Friday Night Handicapped Chip Tournament
phone_number: $30 entry ($5 to break & run pot, $5 green fee, $20 to prize fund). $100 added at 20 players, $150 added at 32. Game type: lagger's choice between 9-Ball, 10-Ball, and Semi-Fast 8-Ball. 10-Ball break & run contest on 9ft Diamond table. New Aces & 8s contest. Chip system: H6 & below = 4 chips, H7 = 3 chips. Races: H4 & below = race to 2, H5 = race to 3, H6 = race to 4, H7 = race to 5. 2 side pot options: $10 and $20. Semi-Fast 8 rules: rack like diagram, alternating break, RYO, must hit head ball on break, must take what you make if only one category. Can't win or lose on break. After break, tap rules. No pros or known road players. Winner or split 2 weeks in a row = sit out one week. Every Friday 7PM. Located at Krome Billiards, North Little Rock AR.
